case_title: WILLIAM BARKER VS. CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARKER, WILLIAM CONSERVATOR FOR PAULINE BARKER AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER DOES 1-50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-11-2010 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-09-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-27-2010

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR TEMP RESTRAINING ORDER AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE; MEMO OF P AND A; DECLARATION(S), POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARKER, WILLIAM CONSERVATOR FOR PAULINE BARKER
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE REGARDING PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION HEARING SET FOR SEP-24-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
MEMO P/A IN RESPONSE TO OSC RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION FILED BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER
DECLARATION OF BARBARA BECKER, RN IN SUPPORT OF DEFT'S RESPONSE TO OSC RE: PRELMINARY INJUNCTION FILED BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER
LAW AND MOTION, 301, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE REGARDING PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION, OFF CALENDAR AT THE REQUEST OF THE MOVING PARTY.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: TABARI, CYRUS ALI SUBSTITUTED FOR ZACHARIN, ALAN JAY AS ATTORNEY FOR CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER HEARING SET FOR DEC-01-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
NON-OPPOSITION TO DEFT'S DEMURRER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARKER, WILLIAM CONSERVATOR FOR PAULINE BARKER
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-01-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION, 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION ON NOVEMBER 12, 2009. NON-OPPOSITION FILED BY PLAINTIFF ON NOVEMBER 13, 2009. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 301/PJB
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-11-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
